name: Benihana's Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package directions.
2. In a large skillet, melt butter.
3. Add onions, carrots, and scallions. Saute until the carrots are translucent. Set aside.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Place sesame seeds in a shallow pan. Bake for 10-15 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally for even color.
6. Lightly grease another skillet. Beat the eggs and pour into the hot skillet. Cook as you would scrambled eggs.
7. Combine the rice, vegetables, sesame seeds, and eggs. Add soy sauce. Stir.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
